name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: 2026-06-07 (Sunday): **THE $24bn DEMAND VOICED BY MOJTABA'S ADVISER REZAEI WAS DIRECTLY ATTACKED BY WASHINGTON, AND THE HEU-DIRECTIVE WINDOW EXPIRED QUIETLY — WHILE ISW RE-CENTRED THE POWER MAP ON THE IRGC/VAHIDI INNER CIRCLE.** (1) BESSENT INVERTS REZAEI'S DEMAND (intel B1): Treasury moved (6 Jun) to spend the $24bn in frozen Iranian assets — the very sum Rezaei (military adviser to Mojtaba) made the deal's 'test of trust' — on rebuilding the Gulf states Iran bombed; the regime's central precondition is being weaponised against it (deal-failure probability up). (2) HEU DIRECTIVE WINDOW EXPIRED (intel A5): the reported Mojtaba directive (~440kg 60%-HEU not to leave Iran) stayed un-walked-back, and the 14-day window for state-media confirmation OR a walk-back (by 2026-06-05) PASSED WITH NEITHER — consistent with the directive being internal posture, not an operational act. (3) ISW POWER-MAP (intel A1/D): ISW now characterises the regime as dominated by IRGC commander Maj. Gen. Ahmad Vahidi and his inner circle, which it says suspended talks on 1 June and prefers the status quo — a sharper power-center claim to track against the Mojtaba/Rezaei surface. No proof-of-life of Mojtaba himself this window. Day 99 (Saturday June 6; covers 4 June afternoon -> 5 June -> 5-6 June overnight Gulf exchange). **MOJTABA'S MILITARY ADVISER REZAEI BECAME THE VOICE OF THE $24bn DEADLOCK AND THE WIDER-WAR THREAT — WHILE THE HEU DIRECTIVE STAYED UN-WALKED-BACK AND THE ~5-JUNE WINDOW PASSED QUIETLY.** (1) THE REZAEI CHANNEL (intel A2): Mohsen Rezaei — military adviser to Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei — told CNN (5 June) negotiations are 'at a deadlock and Trump must break this deadlock,' framing $24 billion in frozen Iranian assets as 'a test of trust… The ball is in Trump's court' — a DOUBLING from late May's $12bn and the clearest leadership-adjacent articulation of the money-first / nuclear-deferred posture in the cycle. He attached RHETORIC/THREAT (conditional, not acts): a threat to 'drag the war' beyond the Persian Gulf into the INDIAN OCEAN, RED SEA and MEDITERRANEAN against US bases if fighting resumes; skepticism any nuclear deal survives Trump; and a reassertion of the Hormuz joint-management-with-Oman + transit-toll proposal. This is a leadership-adjacent voice speaking publicly while Mojtaba himself remains absent — the same equilibrium (institutional command without visible person) that has carried the regime since 28 Feb. (2) THE HEU DIRECTIVE (intel A5): the reported Mojtaba directive that Iran's ~440kg of 60%-HEU not leave the country remains UN-WALKED-BACK (REPORTED, single-lineage), with no proof-of-life, and the internal ~5-June window has now PASSED QUIETLY — consistent with internal posture, not an operational act. The deadlock is now MONEY, not nuclear (Rezaei's $24bn), directionally consistent with the directive's substance (keep the HEU, take the cash) without confirming or walking it back. The IAEA reports a complete LOSS OF CONTINUITY since the 28-Feb access termination (Grossi: 'movement detected near the stockpile,' urging Iran to engage 'without delay'); Iran's non-response is the operative reality. The proof-of-life trigger STAYS WATCHING; the negative-space signal persists. PRIOR — Day 97 (Thursday June 4; covers 3 June afternoon -> 4 June US day / 5 June IST). **MOJTABA HEU-DIRECTIVE WATCH ~AT/JUST PAST THE ~5 JUNE WINDOW — STILL NO PROOF-OF-LIFE, STILL UN-WALKED-BACK; THE NEW ELEMENT IS THE IAEA GOING PUBLIC.** The reported directive that Iran's ~440.9 kg of 60%-HEU not leave the country remains un-confirmed and un-walked-back, the internal ~5 June window now at/just past with the thread still dark — consistent with 'internal posture, not an operational act.' The NEW element (intel A5/B2): the IAEA on 4 June publicly called on Iran to engage 'constructively' and allow verification 'without delay,' noting the strikes created 'an unprecedented situation' — the multilateral body stepping into the vacuum left by the stalled bilateral track and the 28-Feb access termination. Iran has NOT responded to the IAEA call (the blackout continues — itself the answer). The proof-of-life trigger STAYS WATCHING; the negative-space signal persists. No proof the HEU has moved, no denial, no fresh corroboration of the directive — the window passing quietly is consistent with internal posture, not an operational act. PRIOR — Day 96 (Wednesday June 3; covers 2 June afternoon -> 3 June morning). **MOJTABA HEU-DIRECTIVE WATCH ~DAY 13 OF 14 (DEADLINE ~JUNE 5, ~48H OUT) — STILL NO PROOF-OF-LIFE, STILL UN-WALKED-BACK; THE HARDENED SUSPENSION REMOVES THE NEGOTIATION FORUM.** The directive that Iran's HEU not leave the country remains un-confirmed and un-walked-back, ~Day 13 of 14, with still no verified video/audio appearance. Iran's 3 June hardening of the talks suspension (Tasnim: 'no response given, text-exchange suspended until Lebanon conditions met') removes the forum in which HEU disposal/custodian arrangements would be negotiated — leaving the directive's substance (keep the HEU) operatively dominant by default. Rubio's 'prospect Iran could negotiate aspects of its nuclear programme' (CLAIMED, US) runs directly against that. The proof-of-life trigger STAYS WATCHING; the negative-space signal persists. Binary for ~5 June unchanged: does state media ever confirm or quietly drop the directive — resolves in ~48 hours. PRIOR — Day 95 (Monday June 2; covers 30 May afternoon -> 2 June morning). **MOJTABA HEU-DIRECTIVE WATCH ~DAY 12 OF 14 (DEADLINE ~JUNE 5) — STILL NO PROOF-OF-LIFE, STILL UN-WALKED-BACK; NOW COMPOUNDED BY THE SUSPENDED TALKS. The directive that Iran's HEU not leave the country remains un-confirmed and un-walked-back, ~Day 12 of 14, with still no verified video/audio appearance. Iran's 1 June suspension of the indirect talks (intel A1) keeps the nuclear file off-table and removes the forum in which HEU disposal would be negotiated — leaving the directive's substance (keep the HEU) operatively dominant by default. One 2 June aggregation floated that the 'new supreme leader may be engaged with US talks' — unverified, soft, contradicted by the suspension; do NOT elevate (no proof-of-life). The proof-of-life trigger STAYS WATCHING; the negative-space signal persists. The binary for ~5 June is unchanged: does state media ever confirm or quietly drop the directive. PRIOR — Day 92 (Saturday May 30). **MOJTABA HEU-DIRECTIVE WATCH ~DAY 9 OF 14 (DEADLINE ~JUNE 5) — STILL NO PROOF-OF-LIFE, STILL UN-WALKED-BACK. The directive that Iran's HEU not leave the country (Reuters, two senior sources) stands; no video/audio appearance surfaced this window. Fars's money-first reframing of the deal (the centerpiece is a $12bn frozen-asset release, not nuclear concessions; intel A2/B2) reprices Iran's ask in a direction CONSISTENT with the directive's substance — keep the HEU, take the cash — but does not confirm or walk it back. The negative-space signal persists; no trigger move.** Day 81 of operational silence (Day 90 of Hormuz blockade, Thursday May 28). **THE MOJTABA HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE IS NOW DAY 7 OF THE 14-DAY WINDOW (DEADLINE ~JUNE 5) — THE HALFWAY MARK — AND THE NEGATIVE-SPACE SIGNAL STILL PERSISTS: Iranian state media STILL neither confirms, denies, NOR walks back the May 21 leaked directive that 60%-HEU stays strictly inside Iran. Today the nuclear file is PUBLICLY CONTESTED FROM ALL SIDES with nothing resolving the directive's status: Trump insists the HEU 'will be destroyed' with 'no sanctions relief'; Khamenei adviser Shamkhani calls US control of Iran's nuclear programme a 'fantasy'; FM Araghchi reports a 'deadlock'; Tasnim claims the Doha stockpile talks were 'generally positive.' The US 'disposal/destroyed' framing and the continued Iranian state-media silence on the retention directive continue to point in OPPOSITE directions — the cleanest unresolved contradiction on Mojtaba's role of the cycle. PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE DAY 21 — no verified video or audio since assuming the role March 8 (AI-generated videos remain the regime's mode of presenting messages attributed to him).** The directive's operating mode stays stable: a regime-internal signal in international information space that requires neither Iranian formal endorsement NOR walk-back — the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling. Tag CLAIMED-CONTESTED (NO CHANGE). **Mojtaba-HEU directive trigger (by 2026-06-05) STAYS WATCHING at the Day 7/14 halfway mark. NO upgrade on REPORTED/CLAIMED-CONTESTED inputs; today is rhetoric/diplomatic posture.** PRIOR (May 27): **THE MOJTABA HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE IS NOW DAY 6 OF THE 14-DAY WINDOW (BY JUNE 5) — AND THE NEGATIVE-SPACE SIGNAL PERSISTS: Iranian state media has STILL neither confirmed nor walked it back. Against that silence, the 'largely negotiated' deal reportedly includes an HEU 'disposal' mechanism — yet Khamenei adviser Shamkhani called US control of Iran's nuclear programme a 'fantasy' and Iran wants nuclear deferred. The US 'disposal' framing and the continued Iranian state-media silence on the HEU-retention directive continue to point in opposite directions — the cleanest unresolved contradiction on Mojtaba's role of the cycle. PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE CONTINUES — DAY 20, no verified video or audio since assuming the role March 8 (AI-generated videos remain the regime's mode of presenting messages attributed to him).** The directive's operating mode stays stable: a regime-internal signal in international information space that requires neither Iranian formal endorsement NOR walk-back — the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling. **Mojtaba-HEU trigger (by 2026-06-05) STAYS WATCHING. NO upgrade on REPORTED/CLAIMED-CONTESTED inputs; today is rhetoric/diplomatic posture.** PRIOR (May 25): **THE MOJTABA HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE IS NOW DAY 4 OF THE 14-DAY WINDOW (BY JUNE 5) — AND THE NEGATIVE-SPACE SIGNAL PERSISTS: IRANIAN STATE MEDIA HAS STILL NEITHER CONFIRMED NOR WALKED BACK IT. AGAINST THAT SILENCE, US SOURCES (AXIOS) NOW CLAIM IRANIANS GAVE ASSURANCES 'VERBAL AND IN WRITING' THAT ANY PERMANENT DEAL WILL INCLUDE 'DISPOSAL' OF ALL ENRICHED URANIUM, AND THAT MOJTABA KHAMENEI 'ENDORSED THE BROAD TEMPLATE' (FINAL APPROVAL OPEN) — DIRECTLY CONTRADICTED BY IRAN FM BAGHAEI MAY 25: NUCLEAR 'ISN'T PART OF DISCUSSIONS AT THIS STAGE.' THE US 'ENDORSED-TEMPLATE' CLAIM AND THE CONTINUED IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA SILENCE ON THE HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE NOW POINT IN OPPOSITE DIRECTIONS — THE CLEANEST UNRESOLVED CONTRADICTION ON MOJTABA'S ROLE OF THE CYCLE. PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE DAY 18 — NO VIDEO, NO AUDIO SINCE ASSUMING ROLE MARCH 8.** (1) **US claim that Mojtaba 'endorsed the broad template' (REPORTED — Axios May 24, single channel)**: pairs with the 'verbal and in writing' HEU-disposal-assurance claim and the prior May 24 White House framing that Mojtaba 'would take several days to approve any deal.' (2) **Continued state-media silence (CONFIRMED ABSENCE)**: no IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV original Mojtaba content confirming or walking back the May 21 HEU-retention directive through May 25 — the wire chain continues to recycle the original Reuters anonymous-source piece. (3) **Baghaei implicit alignment (CONFIRMED RHETORIC)**: 'nuclear isn't part of discussions at this stage' is structurally consistent with the directive's substance (retention) without explicit Mojtaba attribution — the OPPOSITE of the US 'endorsed disposal template' claim. (4) **Pezeshkian no-weapons assurance (CONFIRMED RHETORIC)**: 'ready to assure the world it is not pursuing nuclear weapons' — compatible with both keeping and disposing, resolving nothing about the directive. (5) **The directive's operating mode stays stable**: it functions as a regime-internal signal in international information space (used by US admin officials, market participants, Trump's private Netanyahu call) without requiring Iranian formal endorsement OR walk-back — the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling. **The next operational test**: whether IRNA/Tasnim run enrichment-rights coverage implicitly affirming the directive, or anonymous Iranian sources walk it back as 'misinterpretation.' **NO upgrade on the REPORTED/CLAIMED-CONTESTED inputs; today is rhetoric/diplomatic posture.** PRIOR (May 24): **MOJTABA NOW PUBLICLY NAMED BY US ADMINISTRATION AS DECISION-LOCUS — WHITE HOUSE OFFICIALS TOLD REPORTERS IRANIAN SUPREME LEADER MOJTABA KHAMENEI 'WOULD TAKE SEVERAL DAYS TO APPROVE ANY DEAL' (JPost primary, May 24). FIRST US-SIDE INSTITUTIONAL ACKNOWLEDGEMENT of Mojtaba as decision-locus on the Iranian side, consistent with the May 21 Al Arabiya leak architecture. Mojtaba uranium directive Day 3 of 14 — NO Iranian state-media confirmation/denial/walk-back. Baghaei's 'nuclear issues are not a focus of the peace talks at this stage' is implicit alignment with directive substance without explicit attribution. Trump's softer 'satisfactorily handled' uranium formulation (May 23) is the US-side accommodation of directive's substance; Trump's PRIVATE assurance to Netanyahu (TOI sources May 24) that he 'will not sign any final agreement without the conditions that Iran dismantle its entire nuclear program and remove all enriched uranium from the country' is the CONTRADICTORY public-private framing — either Trump is double-tracking or the admin source over-stated Iranian acceptance.** PRIOR (May 23): **MOJTABA URANIUM DIRECTIVE DAY 2 OF 14 TOWARD JUNE 5 CONFIRMATION/WALK-BACK DEADLINE — NO IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA OUTLET (IRNA, TASNIM, MEHR, PRESS TV) HAS CONFIRMED, DENIED, OR WALKED BACK THE MAY 21 LEAKED DIRECTIVE. GOLD MARKET PRICED THE DIRECTIVE AS MATERIAL WITH THURSDAY'S $4,500-BREAK; TRUMP'S SOFTER 'SATISFACTORILY HANDLED' URANIUM FORMULATION (vs MAY 16 LETTER 'FULL DISMANTLEMENT') IS THE MATCHING US-SIDE ACCOMMODATION. THE DIRECTIVE IS OPERATING AS REGIME-INTERNAL SIGNAL IN INTERNATIONAL INFORMATION SPACE WITHOUT REQUIRING IRANIAN FORMAL ENDORSEMENT.** Daily Sabah May 22 piece 'Iran supreme leader vows to keep enriched uranium in country' amplifies the original Reuters wire without adding independent sourcing; Geo TV, Al Arabiya, and Kathmandu Post similarly recycle. **The market has priced the directive as material**: gold fell to $4,510.60 Thursday holding above $4,500 Friday (FXStreet, Trading Economics). **The cleanest read**: directive operating as regime-internal signal in international information space without requiring Iranian formal endorsement, exactly as May 22 brief framed (lowest-cost mode of policy signaling). **Today's NEW corroborating signal**: Trump's softer 'satisfactorily handled' formulation on uranium (per CBS May 23 quotes) — suggests US verbally accommodating directive's substance even without deal. **Iran FM Baghaei (per IRNA quote)** said 'nuclear issues were not being discussed' and conclusion would not be reached 'if the US sought to delve into details about highly enriched uranium in Iran' — structurally consistent with directive's substance without explicit attribution to Mojtaba. **The next operational test**: whether IRNA or Tasnim begin running enrichment-rights coverage that implicitly affirms the directive, or whether anonymous Iranian sources begin walking it back as 'misinterpretation.' **Public-appearance silence Day 16** — no video, no audio since assuming role March 8. PRIOR (May 22): **FIRST PUBLICLY-ATTRIBUTED SUBSTANTIVE POLICY DIRECTIVE FROM MOJTABA SINCE HIS APPOINTMENT IN MARCH — LEAKED MAY 21 VIA REUTERS WIRE: ENRICHED URANIUM (60%) ORDERED TO REMAIN STRICTLY INSIDE IRANIAN TERRITORY. THE VOICE ENTERED THE LEAK ARCHITECTURE EVEN AS THE PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE EXTENDS TO DAY 15.** Anonymous Iranian sources told Reuters (propagated via Algemeiner, Kathmandu Post, CDM Press May 21) that 'Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei ordered that Iran's stockpile of uranium enriched to 60% remain strictly inside Iranian territory' and that 'The Supreme Leader's directive, and the consensus within the establishment, is that the stockpile of enriched uranium should not leave the country.' Sources framed the reasoning as Iran would be 'more vulnerable to future attacks by the United States and Israel' if material left the country. **This is structurally the first publicly-attributed substantive policy directive from Mojtaba since his appointment in March, surfaced AT THE EXACT MOMENT the Pakistan-mediated framework is moving** — timing is consistent with regime-internal signal to Trump that the nuclear track is foreclosed independent of whatever ceasefire/Hormuz/sanctions architecture Pakistan can deliver. **The trigger 'Mojtaba Khamenei verified appearance' (watching Day 12 May 19) advances to Day 15 with the public-silence pattern intact but the leak-architecture-voice pattern now operative.** Pezeshkian's May 7 'I met him for 2.5 hours' remains the only senior-Iranian on-record confirmation; CNN's 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' framing remains operative on the public-appearance axis. **The mechanism inside the deal architecture**: Trump's May 16 letter required full dismantlement + zero enrichment within 2 months; the leaked Al Arabiya text (May 22) addresses Hormuz/ceasefire/sanctions but NOT uranium; Mojtaba's directive (if real) makes the substantive nuclear track non-deliverable. **Sadjadpour 'two hubris' frame re-validated**: the institutional architecture is generating a public-foreclosure signal even as the procedural track moves paper through Pakistan — same pattern as May 19's IRIB 'retreat-based-on-fear' framing, escalated. **Verification discipline**: Reuters wire amplification via 3 outlets all trace to anonymous Iranian sources — counts as ONE source via wire amplification per the verification protocol. Tag at REPORTED, not CONFIRMED. **The institutional-command-without-visible-person equilibrium has now evolved**: where it was previously absence on both appearance AND voice dimensions, now Mojtaba's voice (directive) has entered public discourse via leak channel while his appearance remains absent. The regime has chosen the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling — let an attributed directive leak rather than produce a video. **This is institutional confidence**: if the regime were unable to produce Mojtaba at all, the directive would be too risky (it would invite an Iranian-official denial). The leak suggests the regime CAN produce him but chooses not to. PRIOR (May 19): **A5 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 11 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE — TASNIM RUNS ABDOLLAHI-BRIEFING NARRATIVE, NO VERIFIED APPEARANCE.** Tasnim reported Sunday-Monday that **Major General Ali Abdollahi, commander of Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, briefed Mojtaba on the readiness of the armed forces** (army, IRGC, police, intelligence, border forces, defense ministry, Basij militia). **Second state-media positioning act in three days, following Pezeshkian's earlier claim that he had met with Mojtaba 'for hours.'** Middle East Forum frames these reports as a **deliberate state-media campaign to reinforce Mojtaba's leadership narrative in the absence of a verified appearance** — there has been no video, no audio, no photograph of Mojtaba since the war began, and Iran International continues to report (single-source diaspora) 'severe and disfiguring wounds, possible leg loss.' **The intensification of state-media positioning without a public appearance is the cleanest signal that the regime cannot produce him** — and yet the regime continues to consolidate decision-making around him on paper. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED at Day 11; the 'Iranian state media releases Mojtaba Khamenei video/audio refuting Mashhad mural within 7 days' trigger has expired UNTRIPPED. CLAIMED tag holds (Iranian state media reports ABOUT Mojtaba, not BY/OF Mojtaba). CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' Western consensus reading; state-media positioning is the regime counter-narrative. **PRIOR (May 17): A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 10 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — no verified appearance or authenticated live audio/video since assuming role of Supreme Leader on March 8. Per current reporting (CNN, Iran International, The National Abu Dhabi, Voice of Emirates): more than two months of absence; statements attributed to him read out by others or issued in writing; the regime has used **AI-generated videos** to present 'messages' attributed to him; no authentic photos or audio recordings have surfaced. **The IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than Mojtaba (logged May 15) continues to be the cleanest institutional tell of the cycle on Mojtaba's constrained authority.** **Iran International's claim that Mojtaba issued 'new and decisive directives' without elaboration (CBS-cited) is single-sourced through diaspora press; verification tight, NO graph elevation.** **The institutional-command-without-visible-person equilibrium is stable.** Trigger ('Mojtaba appears on video/audio') UNTRIPPED. Pezeshkian's May 7 first-person claim of meeting Mojtaba remains the only senior-official-witnessed contact and is on record but unverified; The National Abu Dhabi (cited via earlier brief) tilted toward injury narrative in mid-May coverage. **PRIOR (May 16):** Day 70 of operational silence. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 9 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** since Pezeshkian's May 7 reported meeting. **On May 13, a portrait of Mojtaba Khamenei was held during Iran's national football team's farewell ceremony ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup (channelstv primary observational)** — a **PORTRAIT**, NOT the Supreme Leader himself. **This is the institutional substitute for personal appearance** — a regime functioning around an absent center, willing to physically display imagery of Mojtaba in public space while withholding any actual appearance. The CNN April 21 framing 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive' continues to hold structurally. The IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than supposedly-active Mojtaba (closed yesterday Day 5/5) remains the institutional tell. Pezeshkian's May 7 first-person claim remains the only senior-official-witnessed contact. **Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio'** UNTRIPPED — institutional command without visible person remains stable equilibrium since Feb 28. **Day 70 of operational silence + portrait at football send-off = the regime is deliberately deploying photographic substitutes rather than re-emerging the actual person.** PRIOR (May 15): **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 8 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting; no video, audio, or appearance since the May 7 Pezeshkian-meeting statement. **Today the IRGC's 'Martyred Commander' drill ended with codename 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the deceased Ali rather than the supposedly-active Mojtaba.** The drill's nomenclature leaning on Ali rather than Mojtaba is the institutional pattern of regime functioning around an absent center. **No Iranian state-media outlet (IRNA, Tasnim, Mehr, Press TV, Islam Times, Pars Today) has carried any direct Mojtaba statement, image, or recording May 8-15.** CNN's April 21 piece 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' remains the cleanest English-language framing, with explicit mention of AI-generated videos of Khamenei being used by the regime, fueling speculation that he is incapacitated or abroad. The institutional pattern — IRGC drill nomenclature leaning on Ali rather than Mojtaba, Pezeshkian as the visible civilian face, Araghchi as the visible foreign-policy face, Wang Yi pressing for ceasefire May 6 with the comprehensive-strategic-partnership framing, and now Akraminia (Artesh) speaking on military readiness — is a regime functioning around an absent center. Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing remains the cleanest read; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative. No new public appearance, no audio, no video. **A12 STRUCTURAL SIGNAL: The IRGC's 5-day Tehran combat exercise launched May 12-13 was named 'Martyred Commander' / 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father, whose death was confirmed in March 2026), NOT Mojtaba.** When the IRGC explicitly invokes the deceased Khamenei rather than the supposedly-active new Supreme Leader, it suggests the institutional imagery is leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained. **This is the cleanest single new institutional signal in cycle that Mojtaba's authority is structurally limited.** Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing remains the cleanest read; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative. CNN April 21 long read + TIME's 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme' (April 21) remain the institutional analytic backdrop. Mehr News + Press TV + Tasnim + Islam Times all on the Martyred Commander codename — none of them on Mojtaba. Absence-of-appearance confirmed across IRNA / Tasnim / Press TV / Pars Today. PRIOR (May 13): Conflicting reports persist: NYT (citing four Iranian officials) says Mojtaba sustained serious injuries — multiple surgeries on legs and arms, difficulty speaking due to severe facial and lip burns. An aide rebuts with 'in perfect health... only a fracture behind his ear, slightly injured knee and back.' The National (Abu Dhabi) coverage tilted toward the injury-narrative read on May 10. CNN's April 21 'the regime's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime survive' frame is now operational reality at 8+ weeks. **Institutional command without visible person remains the stable equilibrium that has carried the regime since February 28; the trigger (video/audio appearance) HAS NOT FIRED.** This is the operative read: Mojtaba's command is institutional, not visible. Iran tone HARDENING across IRNA/Tasnim/Parliament (Rezaei 90% rhetoric); Mohammadi (Deputy Labour Minister) publicly admitted >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted — domestic economic damage now publicly quantified by Tehran while command remains absent. ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **PEZESHKIAN-MOJTABA 2.5-HOUR MEETING CLAIM IS NOW DAY 4 WITHOUT IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA CORROBORATION (no video, no audio, no photo, no readout, no location, no participant list).** **NETANYAHU CBS 60 MINUTES AIRED MAY 11: 'I BELIEVE [MOJTABA] IS ALIVE BUT HE'S HOLED UP IN SOME BUNKER' — independently consistent with US intel community May 8 assessment (CNN/KVIA) that Mojtaba is 'shaping strategy' but 'out of public view.' Convergence of US + Israeli intel framing on 'alive but in bunker' AGAINST the absence of any Iranian state-media physical evidence is the operative read: Mojtaba's command is institutional, not visible.** Pezeshkian's May 12 'resistance and protecting honor' speech at Ministry of Industry made no fresh reference to the alleged meeting. The continued vacuum reinforces the Stage-2 managed-leadership-vacuum read. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 65. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel + Israeli-intel 'alive but in bunker' lines operate against each other in the public information space, with the US-intel + Israeli-intel reading now CONVERGENT (single source originally, now multi-source). Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation. Iran's source tone is hardening (Tasnim's Velayati Trump-Xi summit-timed jab; IRNA's Army spokesperson Akraminia 'surprising options' warning) but no public statement attributed to Mojtaba in any form. No date, location, participant list, readout, video, photo, or audio. The information vacuum is widening, not narrowing. CNN/KVIA US-intel assessment that Mojtaba is 'alive and shaping strategy' but 'out of public view' unchanged. **This is itself an intelligence signal:** if a credible meeting had occurred, the regime would by now have produced video or at minimum a photograph for domestic legitimacy — particularly during a week when the supreme leader's authority over a potential MOU is the central question. The continued vacuum reinforces the Stage-2 managed-leadership-vacuum read. **Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine speech remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation** — no new public statement by Mokhber today; no Iranian state media has produced a follow-up speech, retraction, or amplification in past 24 hours. The institutional intelligence value of Mokhber's speech is durable. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 63. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel 'out of public view' line operate against each other in the public information space. Pezeshkian provided NO date, NO location, NO list of other participants, NO substantive readout, NO video/audio/photo. Read as intelligence: regime is in second stage of a managed-leadership-vacuum playbook — Stage 1 (March-April) was written-only statements via state TV; Stage 2 (May) is named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without producing evidence. **MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' SPEECH REINFORCES THE THESIS:** Mohammad Mokhber (described in Pakistani/Iranian outlets as adviser to Mojtaba specifically) publicly delivered the maximalist Hormuz-control doctrine May 8 — leadership-adjacent voices speaking publicly while Mojtaba himself remains absent. Yesterday's TIME April 21 disclosure of AI-generated videos remains structural reason MOU signature within one week is implausible — leadership-decision authority cannot be exercised through proxies on a deal of this scale. The Pezeshkian claim therefore reads as a credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation as much as a domestic-narrative move. The IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made in the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers mid-MOU window. Iran International (diaspora) had run Pezeshkian-IRGC factional-divergence framing this week. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 62. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike.

active_triggers.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei signals willingness to negotiate
active_triggers.note_2026-05-28: HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE COUNTDOWN — Day 7 of the 14-day window (deadline ~June 5), the HALFWAY MARK. The May 21 leaked Mojtaba directive (60%-HEU stays strictly inside Iran) STILL has no Iranian state-media confirmation, denial, or walk-back — the negative-space signal persists. Today the nuclear file is publicly contested from all sides with nothing resolving the directive's status: Trump insists the HEU 'will be destroyed' with 'no sanctions relief'; Shamkhani calls US nuclear control a 'fantasy'; Araghchi reports 'deadlock'; Tasnim claims Doha stockpile talks were 'generally positive.' Tag CLAIMED-CONTESTED (no change). STAYS WATCHING — no trigger moves to active; today is rhetoric/diplomatic posture, not confirmed action.
active_triggers.note_2026-06-06: HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE — ~at/just past the ~5 June window, which PASSED QUIETLY. STAYS WATCHING. Still no state-media confirmation, denial or walk-back; no proof-of-life. Rezaei (Mojtaba's military adviser) reframed the deadlock as MONEY ($24bn, doubling from $12bn — 'ball in Trump's court'), directionally consistent with the directive's substance (keep the HEU, take the cash) but not a confirmation or walk-back. Tag REPORTED/negative-space — no upgrade.

top_edges.context: 2026-06-06: HEU directive un-walked-back, ~5-June window passed quietly; deadlock reframed as money ($24bn) not nuclear — directionally consistent with directive. REPORTED/negative-space, modest.
2026-06-06: Rezaei (Mojtaba's adviser) puts the $24bn 'ball in Trump's court' vs Trump's 'deal this weekend' claim; Mojtaba HEU directive un-walked-back. Stated-position/rhetoric, modest.

2026-06-06: Mojtaba's military adviser Rezaei voiced the $24bn deadlock ('ball in Trump's court,' doubling from $12bn) + wider-war threat (RHETORIC); HEU directive un-walked-back, ~5-June window passed quietly. No confirmed action — modest.

recent_signals.headline: SL Mojtaba Khamenei released an 18 Jun WRITTEN statement ENDORSING the MoU — resolving the prior 'reservations' ambiguity in the deal's favour and boxing in the hardliners. Still a written statement, not a video: proof-of-life trigger remains unmet, but the deal now has explicit SL backing on record. REPORTED.

A message ATTRIBUTED to the Supreme Leader (Mojtaba) voicing reservations about the US deal sparked a Tehran debate — hardliners read it as the leader being sidelined, govt as a diplomatic roadmap. Given the persistent proof-of-life ambiguity, a 'message attributed to' him expressing reservations is exactly the lever hardliners could use to dilute implementation. CLAIMED/REPORTED — positioning, not repudiation. Proof-of-life still unmet.

Still unseen publicly since 28 Feb; communicates via couriers. New Israeli-sourced intelligence claim (ToI) that he is being treated in Qom in 'severe condition', possibly unable to participate in decisions — CLAIMED, single-channel adversarial source, treat as information-pressure as much as fact. Raises the open question of WHO on the Iranian side actually bound Tehran to the framework. Proof-of-life trigger remains unmet.

THE 'KHAMENEI APPROVED' CLAIM IS THIRD-HAND AND HARD TO VERIFY. Trump says he 'understands' Mojtaba Khamenei approved the MoU — attributed to an INTERMEDIARY, not direct confirmation; Tehran has not corroborated. Structural problem: Khamenei (who took the role after Ali Khamenei's 28 Feb assassination) has been in HIDING since, communicating via COURIER with multi-day delays — making a real-time approval claim on the reported timeline implausible to confirm. The most load-bearing claim under a Sunday signing rests on the weakest verification in the dossier. Tag CLAIMED.
recent_signals.verification: CLAIMED (Trump's intermediary attribution; Tehran unconfirmed)

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP SAYS KHAMENEI 'READY TO SIGN.' Trump stated he believes Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is ready to sign off on the settlement, and that discussions were 'brought to the highest level of Iranian leadership and approved.' This is a US CLAIM about the Supreme Leader's position; no direct statement from Khamenei's office was published, and Iran's FM spokesman simultaneously said 'no final conclusion.'
recent_signals.verification: CLAIMED (Trump's characterization; no direct Khamenei statement)

recent_signals.headline: Received the written Pakistani message (from Sharif + Field Marshal Munir) delivered by Interior Minister Naqvi during his Tehran visit -- the channel operates at Supreme-Leader level. No published Iranian response; the silence is itself noted. The channel has not visibly arrested the escalation.
recent_signals.verification: REPORTED

recent_signals.headline: **WASHINGTON REPORTEDLY MOVING TO SPEND THE $24bn MOJTABA'S ADVISER DEMANDED ON IRAN'S VICTIMS; THE HEU-DIRECTIVE WINDOW EXPIRED UN-RESOLVED; ISW RE-CENTRED POWER ON THE IRGC/VAHIDI INNER CIRCLE.** Treasury's 6-June move to fund Gulf reconstruction from frozen Iranian assets directly inverts the $24bn release that Rezaei (Mojtaba's military adviser) set as the deal's non-negotiable 'test of trust' (intel B1). Separately the reported Mojtaba HEU directive (~440kg 60%-HEU not to leave Iran) held un-walked-back through its 14-day window (by 06-05), which expired with no state-media confirmation and no denial — a weak signal it is internal posture, not an operational act (intel A5). ISW assesses the regime as dominated by IRGC commander Vahidi and his inner circle, said to have suspended talks 1 June and to prefer the status quo (intel A1/D).
recent_signals.verification: REPORTED (B1 Bessent policy intent, source familiar w/ thinking); REPORTED (A5 directive single-lineage, window expiry); analyst assessment (ISW)

recent_signals.headline: **MOJTABA'S MILITARY ADVISER REZAEI VOICED THE $24bn DEADLOCK ('BALL IN TRUMP'S COURT,' DOUBLING FROM $12bn) AND A WIDER-WAR THREAT — WHILE THE HEU DIRECTIVE STAYED UN-WALKED-BACK AND THE ~5-JUNE WINDOW PASSED QUIETLY.** Mohsen Rezaei, military adviser to Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, told CNN (5 June) talks are 'at a deadlock and Trump must break this deadlock,' framing $24bn in frozen assets as 'a test of trust… the ball is in Trump's court' (a doubling from $12bn) and threatening to widen the war to the Indian Ocean/Red Sea/Mediterranean against US bases if fighting resumes (RHETORIC/THREAT, conditional). A leadership-adjacent voice speaking publicly while Mojtaba stays absent. The reported HEU-retention directive (~440kg of 60% HEU stays in Iran) remains un-walked-back with no proof-of-life; the internal ~5-June window PASSED QUIETLY — consistent with internal posture, not an operational act. The deadlock is now money not nuclear, directionally consistent with the directive. IAEA reports loss of continuity + 'movement detected near the stockpile,' urging Iran to engage 'without delay.' Proof-of-life trigger stays watching.
sources: CNN 5 June (Rezaei, Mojtaba's military adviser: 'deadlock,' $24bn 'ball in Trump's court,' wider-war theaters)
Reuters (21 May, two senior Iranian sources) via wire — Mojtaba HEU directive — REPORTED, un-walked-back
IAEA / Grossi (loss of continuity since 28 Feb; 'movement detected near stockpile'; engage 'without delay')
recent_signals.verification: Rezaei $24bn 'deadlock' / 'ball in Trump's court' / wider-war theaters = RHETORIC/stated-position (CONFIRMED he said it via CNN; substance CLAIMED); Mojtaba HEU directive = REPORTED (single-lineage), un-walked-back, no proof-of-life, ~5-June window passed quietly (CONFIRMED absence / negative-space); IAEA loss of continuity = CONFIRMED. Proof-of-life trigger STAYS watching; no upgrade.

recent_signals.headline: **HEU-DIRECTIVE WATCH ~DAY 13 OF 14, DEADLINE ~48H OUT — STILL NO PROOF-OF-LIFE, UN-WALKED-BACK; HARDENED SUSPENSION REMOVES THE NEGOTIATION FORUM.** Mojtaba's directive that HEU stay inside Iran remains un-walked-back with no verified appearance. Iran's 3 June hardening of the suspension (Tasnim: 'no response given, text-exchange halted until Lebanon conditions met') removes the forum for HEU disposal/custodian arrangements — the directive (keep the HEU) effectively prevails. Rubio's 'prospect of nuclear negotiation' (CLAIMED) runs against it. Proof-of-life trigger stays watching; binary resolves ~June 5.
sources: Tasnim (suspension hardened); Rubio Senate testimony (3 June, CLAIMED US)

recent_signals.headline: **HEU-DIRECTIVE WATCH ~DAY 12 OF 14 — STILL NO PROOF-OF-LIFE, UN-WALKED-BACK; SUSPENDED TALKS LEAVE THE DIRECTIVE'S SUBSTANCE DOMINANT BY DEFAULT.** Mojtaba's directive that HEU stay inside Iran remains un-walked-back with no appearance. Iran's 1 June suspension of the US talks keeps the nuclear file off-table and removes the disposal-negotiation forum — so the directive (keep the HEU) effectively prevails for now. A 2 June aggregation that the 'new supreme leader may be engaged with US talks' is unverified, contradicted by the suspension, NOT elevated. Proof-of-life trigger stays watching. Deadline ~June 5.

Reuters (21 May, two senior Iranian sources) via Al Arabiya/CDM — directive — REPORTED

recent_signals.headline: **HEU-DIRECTIVE WATCH ~DAY 9 OF 14 — NO PROOF-OF-LIFE, UN-WALKED-BACK; FARS MONEY-FIRST REFRAME IS DIRECTIONALLY CONSISTENT.** Mojtaba's directive that HEU stay inside Iran remains un-walked-back with no appearance this window. recent_signals.headline: **MOJTABA HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE DAY 7 OF 14 (HALFWAY TO ~JUNE 5) — STILL NO IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA CONFIRMATION, DENIAL, OR WALK-BACK; THE NEGATIVE-SPACE SIGNAL PERSISTS. THE NUCLEAR FILE IS PUBLICLY CONTESTED FROM ALL SIDES, NOTHING RESOLVES THE DIRECTIVE: TRUMP SAYS THE HEU 'WILL BE DESTROYED' WITH 'NO SANCTIONS RELIEF'; SHAMKHANI CALLS US NUCLEAR CONTROL A 'FANTASY'; ARAGHCHI REPORTS 'DEADLOCK'; TASNIM CLAIMS DOHA STOCKPILE TALKS WERE 'GENERALLY POSITIVE.' PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE DAY 21 — no verified video or audio since March 8. Tag CLAIMED-CONTESTED (NO CHANGE).** (1) **Continued state-media silence (CONFIRMED ABSENCE)**: through May 28, NO IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV original Mojtaba content confirming, denying, or walking back the May 21 HEU-retention directive — Day 7 of 14, the halfway mark toward the ~June 5 deadline; the negative-space signal persists. (2) **Nuclear file contested, directive unresolved**: Trump insists the HEU 'will be destroyed' with 'no sanctions relief' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC); Shamkhani calls US control of Iran's nuclear programme a 'fantasy' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC); Araghchi reports a 'deadlock' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC); Tasnim claims the Doha stockpile talks were 'generally positive' (CLAIMED) — the spread of positions is wider, but NONE of it confirms or walks back the directive. The US 'destroyed/disposal' framing and the continued state-media silence point in OPPOSITE directions. (3) **Public-appearance silence Day 21** — no video, no audio since assuming the role March 8; AI-generated videos remain the regime's mode of presenting messages attributed to him. (4) **The directive's operating mode stays stable**: a regime-internal signal in international information space that requires neither Iranian formal endorsement NOR walk-back — the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling. **The next operational test**: whether IRNA/Tasnim run enrichment-rights coverage implicitly affirming the directive, or anonymous Iranian sources walk it back as 'misinterpretation,' before the ~June 5 deadline. **Mojtaba-HEU directive trigger (by 2026-06-05) STAYS WATCHING at Day 7/14. NO upgrade on REPORTED/CLAIMED-CONTESTED inputs; today is rhetoric/diplomatic posture.**
sources: Intel dossier 2026-05-28 A7 (Mojtaba HEU-directive Day 7/14, state-media silence persists; nuclear file contested — Trump 'will be destroyed' / 'no sanctions relief'; Shamkhani 'fantasy'; Araghchi 'deadlock'; Tasnim Doha talks 'generally positive')
NO IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV original Mojtaba HEU-directive confirmation or walk-back through May 28 (CONFIRMED ABSENCE)

recent_signals.headline: **MOJTABA HEU-RETENTION DIRECTIVE DAY 4 OF 14 — STILL NO IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA CONFIRMATION OR WALK-BACK. US SOURCES (AXIOS) NOW CLAIM MOJTABA 'ENDORSED THE BROAD TEMPLATE' AND THAT IRANIANS GAVE 'VERBAL AND IN WRITING' ASSURANCES OF HEU 'DISPOSAL' — DIRECTLY CONTRADICTED BY BAGHAEI 'NUCLEAR ISN'T PART OF DISCUSSIONS AT THIS STAGE.' THE US 'ENDORSED-TEMPLATE' CLAIM vs CONTINUED STATE-MEDIA SILENCE POINT IN OPPOSITE DIRECTIONS. PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE DAY 18.** (1) **US 'endorsed broad template' + 'verbal and in writing' disposal claim (REPORTED — Axios May 24, single channel; CBS broad-principles sourcing)**: US sources say the Iranians gave assurances 'verbal and in writing' that any subsequent permanent deal will include the 'disposal' of all enriched uranium, and that Mojtaba Khamenei has 'endorsed the broad template' though final approval is open. This pairs with the May 24 White House framing that Mojtaba 'would take several days to approve any deal.' (2) **Continued state-media silence (CONFIRMED ABSENCE)**: through May 25, NO IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV original Mojtaba content has surfaced confirming, denying, or walking back the May 21 HEU-retention directive — the wire chain continues to recycle the original Reuters anonymous-source piece. **Day 4 of 14 toward the June 5 confirmation/walk-back deadline; the negative-space signal persists.** (3) **Baghaei implicit alignment (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — NBC/CNBC/IRNA/Press TV May 25)**: 'nuclear isn't part of discussions at this stage' is structurally consistent with the HEU-retention directive's substance without explicit Mojtaba attribution — the OPPOSITE of the US 'endorsed disposal template' claim. The two framings now point in opposite directions: US says Mojtaba endorsed disposal; Iranian state media's silence + Baghaei's deflection are consistent with retention. (4) **Pezeshkian no-weapons assurance (CONFIRMED RHETORIC)**: Iran 'is ready to assure the world it is not pursuing nuclear weapons' — a non-proliferation assurance compatible with both keeping and disposing of the stockpile; resolves nothing about whether Mojtaba endorsed disposal or retention. (5) **Public-appearance silence Day 18** — no video, no audio since assuming role March 8; AI-generated videos remain the regime's mode of presenting messages attributed to him. (6) **The directive's operating mode stays stable**: it functions as a regime-internal signal in international information space (cited by US admin officials, market participants, and Trump's private Netanyahu call) without requiring Iranian formal endorsement OR walk-back — the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling, with the signaling cost externalised to anonymous wire leaks. **The next operational test**: whether IRNA/Tasnim run enrichment-rights coverage implicitly affirming the directive, or anonymous Iranian sources walk it back as 'misinterpretation.' **NO upgrade on REPORTED/CLAIMED-CONTESTED inputs; today is rhetoric/diplomatic posture.**
sources: Axios May 24 Barak Ravid (Mojtaba 'endorsed broad template' + HEU 'verbal and in writing' disposal-assurance claim)
NBC News / CNBC May 25 (Baghaei 'nuclear isn't part of discussions at this stage' primary)

NO IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV original Mojtaba HEU-directive confirmation or walk-back May 22-25 (CONFIRMED ABSENCE)
Intel dossier 2026-05-25 A2, A5, D, F

No upgrade — no confirmed Mojtaba content of any kind.

recent_signals.headline: **FIRST US-SIDE INSTITUTIONAL ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF MOJTABA AS DECISION-LOCUS — WHITE HOUSE OFFICIALS TOLD REPORTERS IRANIAN SUPREME LEADER MOJTABA KHAMENEI 'WOULD TAKE SEVERAL DAYS TO APPROVE ANY DEAL.' MOJTABA URANIUM DIRECTIVE DAY 3 OF 14: NO STATE-MEDIA CONFIRMATION/DENIAL/WALK-BACK. BAGHAEI: 'NUCLEAR ISSUES ARE NOT A FOCUS OF THE PEACE TALKS AT THIS STAGE' — IMPLICIT ALIGNMENT WITHOUT ATTRIBUTION. TRUMP-NETANYAHU PRIVATE CALL: TRUMP 'WILL NOT SIGN ANY FINAL AGREEMENT WITHOUT IRAN DISMANTLING ENTIRE NUCLEAR PROGRAM AND REMOVING ALL ENRICHED URANIUM' — DIRECTLY CONTRADICTS ADMIN PUBLIC 'IN PRINCIPLE AGREED TO DISPOSAL.' PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE DAY 17.** (1) **White House officials publicly named Mojtaba as decision-locus** (REPORTED — JPost primary May 24; CBS corroboration of parallel Trump 'no rush' framing): 'did not expect a deal to be reached on Sunday'; Mojtaba 'would take several days to approve any deal.' This is the **first US-side institutional acknowledgement** of Mojtaba as the named decision-locus on the Iranian side — consistent with the May 21 Al Arabiya leak architecture which had Pezeshkian/Araghchi running the procedural track and Mojtaba's office foreclosing the nuclear track via leak. (2) **CBS senior administration source (REPORTED — single anonymous channel)**: 'the Iranians have in principle agreed to a deal that would include the disposal of highly enriched uranium' — CONTRADICTED by Iran FM Baghaei (Jerusalem Post): Iran has 'not yet accepted any actions on its nuclear programme.' (3) **Trump-Netanyahu private call assurance (REPORTED — TOI sources)**: Trump told Netanyahu privately he 'will not sign any final agreement without the conditions that Iran dismantle its entire nuclear program and remove all enriched uranium from the country.' This is the cleanest single contradiction-by-Trump-himself of the admin's 'in principle agreed to disposal' framing — either Trump is double-tracking with Netanyahu vs the press OR the admin source over-stated Iranian acceptance OR the leak is meant to provide Netanyahu cover while admin pushes the deal track. (4) **Mojtaba uranium directive Day 3 of 14** toward June 5 deadline — NO IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV original Mojtaba content has surfaced through May 24 (CONFIRMED ABSENCE); the wire chain continues to recycle the May 21 Reuters anonymous-source piece. (5) **Baghaei (via Press TV / IRNA Sunday)** explicitly stated 'nuclear issues are not a focus of the peace talks at this stage' — structurally consistent with the directive's substance without explicit Mojtaba attribution. (6) **Public-appearance silence Day 17** — no video, no audio since assuming role March 8; AI-generated videos remain the regime's mode of presenting messages attributed to him. (7) **The directive's operating mode is now stable**: it functions as regime-internal signal in international information space (used by US admin officials, market participants, Trump in his private Netanyahu call) without requiring Iranian formal endorsement OR walk-back. This is the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling — the regime has externalised the signaling cost to anonymous wire leaks. (8) **The next operational test**: whether IRNA/Tasnim begin running enrichment-rights coverage that implicitly affirms the directive (e.g., 'Iran's right to enrich uranium is non-negotiable'), or whether anonymous Iranian sources begin walking it back as 'misinterpretation.'
sources: Jerusalem Post May 24 (WH officials 'Mojtaba several days to approve' primary)
CBS News May 24 liveblog (senior admin 'in principle agreed to HEU disposal' primary)
Times of Israel May 24 (Trump-Netanyahu private uranium assurance primary)
Press TV / Mehr / IRNA May 24 (Baghaei 'not a focus' implicit alignment)
recent_signals.verification: WH 'Mojtaba several days' = REPORTED (JPost anonymous WH officials, CBS corroboration of Trump 'no rush'); CBS senior admin 'in principle agreed disposal' = REPORTED (single anonymous source); Trump-Netanyahu private 'will not sign without dismantlement' = REPORTED (TOI sources); Baghaei 'nuclear not a focus' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (IRNA + Press TV + Mehr); NO Iranian state-media original Mojtaba content May 22-24 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; public-appearance silence Day 17 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: **MOJTABA URANIUM DIRECTIVE DAY 2 OF 14: NO IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA OUTLET HAS CONFIRMED, DENIED, OR WALKED BACK THE MAY 21 LEAK. GOLD MARKET PRICED THE DIRECTIVE AS MATERIAL ($4,510-$4,521 RANGE). TRUMP'S 'SATISFACTORILY HANDLED' URANIUM SOFTENING IS THE MATCHING US-SIDE ACCOMMODATION OF DIRECTIVE'S SUBSTANCE WITHOUT FORMAL DEAL. BAGHAEI: 'NUCLEAR ISSUES NOT BEING DISCUSSED.' PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE DAY 16.** (1) Through May 23 IST, NO IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV original Mojtaba content has surfaced (CONFIRMED ABSENCE). Daily Sabah May 22, Geo TV, Al Arabiya, Kathmandu Post all RECYCLE the original Reuters wire without independent sourcing. (2) **Market validation**: gold $4,510.60 Thursday on directive impact, $4,521 Friday close (-0.4% 1D, -3.9% MoM) — directive priced as material but deal-anticipation flow OUT of gold dominates the directive-inflows IN. (3) **Trump's softer 'satisfactorily handled' uranium formulation** (CBS May 23 quotes) = meaningful softening from May 16 letter's 'full dismantling + zero enrichment within 2 months' — US verbally accommodating directive's substance even without formal deal. (4) **Iran FM Baghaei (per IRNA quote)**: 'nuclear issues were not being discussed' + conclusion would not be reached 'if the US sought to delve into details about highly enriched uranium in Iran' — structurally consistent with directive's substance without explicit Mojtaba attribution. (5) **The trigger 'Mojtaba uranium directive publicly confirmed via Iranian state media OR walked back within 14 days (by 2026-06-05)' remains at watching, Day 2 of 14**. Next operational test: whether IRNA/Tasnim begin running enrichment-rights coverage that implicitly affirms the directive, or anonymous Iranian sources walk it back as 'misinterpretation.' (6) **Public-appearance silence Day 16** — no video, no audio since assuming role March 8; AI-generated videos remain the regime's mode of presenting messages attributed to him.

recent_signals.headline: **FIRST PUBLICLY-ATTRIBUTED SUBSTANTIVE POLICY DIRECTIVE FROM MOJTABA SINCE HIS MARCH APPOINTMENT — LEAKED VIA REUTERS WIRE MAY 21: ENRICHED URANIUM (60%) ORDERED TO REMAIN STRICTLY INSIDE IRANIAN TERRITORY. PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE DAY 15 BUT THE VOICE NOW IN THE LEAK ARCHITECTURE.** Anonymous Iranian sources told Reuters (propagated via Algemeiner, Kathmandu Post, CDM Press May 21) that 'Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei ordered that Iran's stockpile of uranium enriched to 60% remain strictly inside Iranian territory' and that 'The Supreme Leader's directive, and the consensus within the establishment, is that the stockpile of enriched uranium should not leave the country.' Sources framed reasoning: Iran would be 'more vulnerable to future attacks by the United States and Israel' if material left the country. **The directive's timing is the signal**: surfaced at the exact moment the Pakistan-mediated framework is moving — regime-internal signal to Trump that the nuclear track is foreclosed independent of operational deliverable architecture. **Trigger 'Mojtaba verified appearance' advances to Day 15**: public-silence pattern intact, but the leak-architecture-voice pattern now operative. Pezeshkian's May 7 'I met him for 2.5 hours' remains the only senior-Iranian on-record confirmation. **The mechanism inside the deal architecture**: Trump's May 16 letter required full dismantlement + zero enrichment within 2 months; the leaked Al Arabiya text (May 22) addresses Hormuz/ceasefire/sanctions but NOT uranium; Mojtaba's directive (if real) makes the substantive nuclear track non-deliverable. **Sadjadpour 'two hubris' frame re-validated**: institutional architecture generates public-foreclosure signal even as procedural track moves paper through Pakistan. **Verification discipline**: Reuters wire amplification via 3 outlets all trace to anonymous Iranian sources — counts as ONE source per protocol. Tag at REPORTED, not CONFIRMED. **Institutional reading**: where Mojtaba was previously absent on both appearance AND voice, now the voice (directive) has entered public discourse via leak channel while the appearance remains absent. The regime chose the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling — let an attributed directive leak rather than produce a video. **This suggests institutional confidence**: if the regime were unable to produce Mojtaba at all, the directive would be too risky (it would invite Iranian-official denial). The leak suggests the regime CAN produce him but chooses not to.
sources: CDM Press May 21 'Ayatollah Orders Highly-Enriched Uranium To Remain In Iran' (Reuters wire amplification)
Reuters citing anonymous Iranian sources (single primary, three-outlet wire propagation)
recent_signals.verification: Mojtaba uranium directive = REPORTED (Reuters wire via 3 outlets all trace to anonymous Iranian sources — counts as ONE source via wire amplification); public-silence Day 15 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; substantive nuclear-track foreclosure inference = INFERRED structural reading based on REPORTED directive.

recent_signals.headline: **DAY 12 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE — CNN re-circulated piece 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive.'** No public appearance, no video, no audio across the two months since appointment by the Assembly of Experts following Ali Khamenei's Feb 28 death. The regime has reportedly used AI-generated videos to show Khamenei delivering messages (Iran International, opposition-leaning but corroborated by Western mainstream framing). Pezeshkian's May 7 claim of meeting Mojtaba 'for two and a half hours' remains uncorroborated by image, audio, or third-party witness. **The May 17 Tasnim claim that Maj. Gen. Ali Abdollahi 'briefed Mojtaba on armed-forces readiness' is the second state-media positioning act in five days that names Mojtaba in operational-command function without producing him.** CLAIMED status load-bearing because it preserves the institutional pillar of 'Iran has a supreme commander capable of binding the regime to a deal.' **Now structurally connects to the Pakistan-mediation deal-execution question**: even if a framework draft is produced, who in the Iranian institutional architecture has the authority to sign it? **Trigger consideration**: 'Mojtaba verified appearance within 14 days of Pakistan mediation framework publication' could be added if a framework draft surfaces — currently no draft, so no trigger added today.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED ABSENCE on appearance; ESCALATING META-COVERAGE; verification floor maintained — Tasnim's reports ABOUT Mojtaba, not BY/OF Mojtaba, remain CLAIMED.

recent_signals.headline: **DAY 11 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE — TASNIM RUNS ABDOLLAHI-BRIEFING NARRATIVE, NO VERIFIED APPEARANCE.** Tasnim Sunday-Monday: Major General Ali Abdollahi (Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ commander) briefed Mojtaba on readiness of armed forces (army, IRGC, police, intelligence, border forces, defense ministry, Basij militia). Second state-media positioning act in three days (after Pezeshkian's earlier 'met for hours' claim). **Middle East Forum frames as 'deliberate state-media campaign to reinforce Mojtaba's leadership narrative in the absence of a verified appearance'** — no video, no audio, no photograph since the war began. Iran International (diaspora opposition) maintains single-source 'severe and disfiguring wounds, possible leg loss' wound claim. **The intensification of state-media positioning without public appearance is the cleanest signal the regime cannot produce him** — yet continues to consolidate decision-making around him on paper. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED at Day 11; 'Iranian state media releases Mojtaba Khamenei video/audio refuting Mashhad mural within 7 days' trigger has expired UNTRIPPED. CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive' = Western consensus reading; state-media positioning is the regime counter-narrative. Pair with TASS/Xinhua non-amplification of Trump posts + Houthi Red Sea Day 7 untripped = coordinated quietism across Iran's institutional surfaces while Western kinetic-preparation rhetoric escalates.
sources: Middle East Forum 'Iranian Media Reinforce Narrative of Mojtaba Khamenei's Leadership' (independent analysis)
Tasnim News Agency (Iranian state-affiliated — Abdollahi briefing primary)
CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' (Western critical)
Iran International (diaspora opposition, single-source wound claims)
recent_signals.verification: Abdollahi briefing reportedly delivered = CLAIMED Iranian state media (Tasnim primary; report ABOUT Mojtaba not BY/OF Mojtaba — verification floor); No verified appearance since Feb 28 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source (IRNA/Tasnim/Press TV); Middle East Forum analysis = CONFIRMED independent observation; Iran International wound claims = REPORTED single-source diaspora.

recent_signals.headline: **A6 DAY 7 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting — no new public appearance, no audio, no video.** **A12 STRUCTURAL SIGNAL: The IRGC's 5-day Tehran combat exercise launched May 12-13 was named 'Martyred Commander' / 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father, whose death was confirmed in March 2026), NOT Mojtaba.** When the IRGC explicitly invokes the deceased Khamenei rather than the supposedly-active new Supreme Leader, it suggests the institutional imagery is leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained. **This is the cleanest single new institutional signal in cycle that Mojtaba's authority is structurally limited.** Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing reinforced; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative.
sources: Mehr News + Press TV + Tasnim + Islam Times + Pars Today (all on the Martyred Commander codename, none of them on Mojtaba)
Absence-of-appearance confirmed across IRNA / Tasnim / Press TV / Pars Today
CNN April 21 long read (institutional analytic backdrop)
TIME 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme' April 21 (institutional analytic backdrop)
recent_signals.verification: Mojtaba Day 7 silence = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; IRGC drill codename invoking Ali (deceased father) rather than Mojtaba = CONFIRMED ACTION (Iranian state media multi-source) — analytical reading of structural signal is INFERRED.

recent_signals.headline: A6 DAY 6 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE POST PEZESHKIAN MAY 7 MEETING; no video/audio of Mojtaba since March 8 appointment. NYT (citing four Iranian officials): serious injuries — multiple surgeries on legs and arms, facial and lip burns affecting speech. Iranian aide rebuts: 'perfect health... only fracture behind ear, slightly injured knee and back.' The National (Abu Dhabi) coverage tilted toward injury narrative May 10. CNN April 21 'the regime's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime survive' frame is now operational reality at 8+ weeks. Institutional command without visible person = stable equilibrium since Feb 28. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' HAS NOT FIRED. Iran tone HARDENING across IRNA/Tasnim/Parliament while command remains absent — Mohammadi (Deputy Labour Minister) publicly admitted >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted; Day 74 of internet blackout. Tehran publicly admitting domestic economic deterioration WHILE publicly hardening on nuclear file. Pezeshkian-Mojtaba 2.5-hour meeting still has no state-media corroboration (Day 6).
sources: Euronews 'Iran's president says he met Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei'
The National (Abu Dhabi) 'how injured is Mojtaba Khamenei' — UAE state
NYT (cited via CNN, four Iranian officials)
Jerusalem Post citing NYT '2 million jobs lost'
Searched IRNA, Tasnim, Press TV, Mehr, ISNA — CONFIRMED ABSENCE of state-media corroboration
recent_signals.verification: Day 6 state-media silence on Pezeshkian meeting = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; NYT injury narrative (four Iranian officials) = REPORTED; Iranian-aide rebuttal = REPORTED both-sides logged; The National (Abu Dhabi) tilt toward injury narrative = CONFIRMED; Mojtaba audio/video appearance trigger HAS NOT FIRED.

recent_signals.headline: DAY 63-64 ABSENCE HOLDS — NO IRANIAN STATE MEDIA CORROBORATION OF PEZESHKIAN'S MAY 8 CLAIM OF 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING IN THE 48 HOURS SINCE; INFORMATION VACUUM WIDENING. No date, location, participant list, readout, video, photo, or audio. The continued vacuum is the strongest evidence the meeting did not occur as described. CNN/KVIA US-intel assessment 'alive shaping strategy out of public view' unchanged. Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine speech remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation — no new statement, retraction, or amplification today. Stage 2 managed-leadership-vacuum playbook reinforced. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 63.
sources: Searched all major Iranian state outlets (IRNA, Tasnim, Press TV, Mehr, ISNA) — CONFIRMED ABSENCE
Times of Israel + L'Orient + MEE + Deccan Herald (Mokhber speech, no new statement today)
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED ABSENCE of state-media corroboration in 48 hours since claim (silence is the new signal); CNN/KVIA US intel assessment 'shaping strategy out of public view' = REPORTED unchanged; Mokhber speech absent of follow-up = CONFIRMED ABSENCE

recent_signals.headline: DAY 62-63 ABSENCE HOLDS — PEZESHKIAN PUBLIC CLAIM OF 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING (CLAIMED, no independent verification, no date/location/participants/visual evidence); CNN/KVIA CARRIED FIRST PUBLIC US INTEL ASSESSMENT (CONFIRMED): MOJTABA ALIVE 'SHAPING STRATEGY' BUT INJURED AND 'OUT OF PUBLIC VIEW'; MOKHBER (DESCRIBED AS MOJTABA'S ADVISER) PUBLICLY DELIVERED 'ATOMIC-BOMB' HORMUZ DOCTRINE — LEADERSHIP-ADJACENT VOICES ACTIVE WHILE MOJTABA HIMSELF REMAINS ABSENT. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel 'out of public view' line operate against each other in the public information space. Read as intelligence: Stage 2 of managed-leadership-vacuum playbook — named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without producing evidence. Pezeshkian claim reads as credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation. The IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers (May 7). Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 62.
sources: Times of Israel + L'Orient + MEE + Deccan Herald (Mokhber speech)

historical_summaries.summary: 4 signals. Appointed Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts | First statement read on Press TV by anchor (no video/audio of Khamenei himself) | Day 29 of conflict — still no video or audio recording of Mojtaba Khamenei released
21 signals. Day 34 of war, Day 25 since appointment as Supreme Leader on March 8 | Day 35: Still no video or audio of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei | Day 37 of war, Day 28 since appointment
